abstract.t:
The Static Context Header Compression and fragmentation (SCHC) framework provides both a header compression mechanism and an optional fragmentation mechanism. This document defines a minimal architecture for SCHC deployments, providing guidance for implementers and operators on the essential components and their interactions required for effective SCHC operation.
The architecture defines the components of a SCHC deployment - Endpoints, Instances, Contexts, Sessions, and Domains - their management, the framing of SCHC Datagrams, and considerations for technology-specific profiles.
